assertions.reason: A fresh account saw the /persona-packs empty state with the headline “No persona packs yet” and a visible “Create your first pack” CTA.
evidence: Observed URL: http://localhost:5180/persona-packs with empty-state copy “No persona packs yet” and “Create your first pack”.

assertions.reason: Opening the create-pack form from the empty state and saving required fields redirected directly to the new pack detail route.
The library list displayed simultaneous draft and published pack cards in the main grid and moved the archived pack into a separate “Archived packs (1)” section with its own archived badge.
evidence: Visible list text included “UT library active draft pack” (draft), “UT library draft pack” (published), and “UT library archived pack” under “Archived packs (1)”.

assertions.reason: Before any proto-persona was added, the draft detail page disabled the Publish button and showed helper copy requiring at least one proto-persona.
evidence: Visible helper text: “Add at least one proto-persona before publishing this pack.” while the Publish button was disabled.

assertions.reason: Publishing opened a confirmation dialog; cancelling kept the pack in draft/v1, and confirming changed the visible state to published/v2.
evidence: After cancelling, the same pack still showed status draft and version v1; after confirming, the page showed status published and version v2.

assertions.reason: Archiving opened a confirmation dialog; confirming changed the pack status to archived and demoted it into the archived-only list section.
